reviews.comment:
Falta mantenimiento al parque. Los lugares para sentarse en mal estado

(Translated by Google)
The park needs maintenance. The seating areas are in poor condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzajh6dzVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene estación de servicio, hay una parrilla y venden quesos fiambres y miel. Tiene un lindo lugar al costado con árboles y pasto en donde se puede comer en unas mesas con bancos de cemento o hacer un  picnic en el pasto

(Translated by Google)
It has a gas station, a grill, and they sell cheese, cold cuts, and honey. There's a nice place on the side with trees and grass where you can eat at tables with cement benches or have a picnic on the grass.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzajRETlZREAE

reviews.comment:
Deberían mejorar un poco la limpieza de los baños o tener más gente limpiando en recambio porque eran un asco. La parte del kiosco todo bien, deberían dividir las filas para los que piden comida de los que vamos sólo por cosas de los estantes y heladeras

(Translated by Google)
They should improve the cleanliness of the bathrooms or have more cleaning staff on duty because they were disgusting. The kiosk area was fine; they should separate the lines for those ordering food from those of us who are just there for things from the shelves and refrigerators.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzdF9Eb0N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Impecable. Los baños limpios y equipados. La cafetería completa. Los servicios de playa correctos. Solo a tener en cuenta q el café es muy liviano.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable. Clean and well-equipped restrooms. Fully stocked cafeteria. Decent beach services. Just be aware that the coffee is very weak.
